config.comments: rounds decimal values in driver alcohol level

entry.value:
from org.apache.commons.io import IOUtils import json from org.apache.nifi.processor.io import StreamCallback from java.nio.charset import StandardCharsets
class ModifyJson(StreamCallback): def process(self, inputStream, outputStream): text = IOUtils.toString(inputStream, StandardCharsets.UTF_8) data = json.loads(text)
val = data.get("Driver_Alcohol_Level") if val not in ["", None]: num = float(val) data["Driver_Alcohol_Level"] = round(num, 3)
output = json.dumps(data) outputStream.write(output.encode('utf-8'))
flowFile = session.get() if flowFile is not None: flowFile = session.write(flowFile, ModifyJson()) session.transfer(flowFile, REL_SUCCESS)

config.comments: drops records with null values in critical fields

entry.value: SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE WHERE Driver_Alcohol_Level IS NOT NULL AND Speed_Limit IS NOT NULL AND Accident_Severity IS NOT NULL AND Driver_Fatigue IS NOT NULL AND Weather_Condition IS NOT NULL
